scripts.install:all: pip install -r requirements.txt && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --names FLASK,VITE --prefix-colors blue,green "python -m backend.app" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --names FLASK,VITE,ELECTRON --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta "python -m backend.app" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run electron"
